title: Widgets and Properties Supported in Grid Widget
breadcrumbs: Widgets and Properties Supported in Grid Widget
text: Widgets and Properties Supported in Grid Widget The Check Box, Color Box, Combo Box, Command Button, Drop-Down List, Edit Box, Picture, and Spin Button are supported in the Grid widget, but many of their properties are not. The following table lists widget properties that are supported in the Grid for at least one widget. Search: Column Property Check Box Color Box Combo Box Command Button Drop-down List Edit Box Picture Spin Button Filter results... 32 rows found Table 1.
